Job Application Form

Test fixture for Job Forms Helper extension - contains various form field patterns

Personal Information (for/id + autocomplete signals)

We'll only use this for application updates
Include country code for international numbers

Address (wrapper pattern)

Employment Details (proximity pattern)

Years of Experience
Current Job Title
Expected Salary
Available Start Date

Skills & Qualifications (aria-labelledby pattern)

Primary Technical Skills
Certifications
Languages Spoken

Additional Information

System Fields (should be skipped)

Rich Text Fields (contenteditable)

Fields Without Labels (name/ID fallback)
